main.top-text: This Halloween IQ Option is bringing you an exclusive opportunity to get a $50 reward for depositing to your Real Trading Account.
main.head: How to get your treat:
main.1: Make a $50 deposit, using the bonus code PUMPKINSPICE any time from October 24th till October 30th.
main.2: Make sure you check the IQ Option traderoom regularly for a chance to catch our Halloween Pumpkin.
main.3: Take a screenshot of the Pumpkin and post it to our Facebook Page to get a $50 reward*!
main.star: *50 USD will be credited within 2-3 working ways to the real trading accounts of the first 100 participant to fulfill all of the obligations as per the Terms and Conditions of the Offer.
